creator: freebsd@gregv.net
text:
(In reply to Li-Wen Hsu from comment #18)

Yes, amd64 for my desktop.  Looks like everything I have is in your working copy at GitHub.  If you want to give me write access in case I find anything else, that would be great, my GitHub username is gregsv.  I'll continue testing as I have time this weekend, and maybe try to tackle the i18n stuff.
